title: Cuba rejects U.S. Embassy request to bring in fuel, calls it ‘shameless’
summary_full: An effective U.S. oil blockade has worsened the island’s energy crisis. The U.S. Embassy in Havana, too, is feeling the effects.
summary_public: An effective U.S. oil blockade has worsened the island’s energy crisis. The U.S. Embassy in Havana, too, is feeling the effects.
